node.title: Uber | OA | Two arrays and List Of Queries

topic.title: Uber | OA | Two arrays and List Of Queries

post.content:
Given two arrays a and b and list of queries. Return the values of get query in an array.
Queries are of two types:
0. update [type, index of element in a, value]. Update the element in a by given value
get [type, sum]. Return the number of ways a[i] + b[j] == sum where 0<=i < len(a) and 0<= j < len(b)

Example:
```
a = [1,2,3] 
b = [4,5]
queries = [[1,6], [0, 1, 2], [1,8]]
result = [2, 2]
```

Explanation
for query 1, 6 can come in 2 ways, 1 + 5 and 2 + 4
for query 2 -> update a[1] += 2 , so a becomes [1,4,3]
for query 3, 8 can come in 2 ways now as well. 4 + 4 and 5 + 3
1 <= a.length < 10^5
1 <= b.length< 10^4

Constraints: 1 <= a <= 1e6
Constraints: 1 <= b <= 1e6
what are the constraints on value of a and b and what are coconstraints on the number of queries?
